caliber.b_semantics: dp caliber: lane m serves B_mb_global=512 distinct sequences (bl=128/GPU/lane), B_total=1024
caliber.form: chained dual-pass MTP rounds: per lane per round two single-token row-position graphs (pass A verify at positions[B], pass B draft at positions+1); accept/reject changes only per-row advance + ratio-4 shadow restore; 2 lanes x 2 passes = 4 pipeline slots; MTP block (mtp.0) as two per-lane tail-stage graphs
caliber.kv: seeded decode residency at 2048; max_seq_len=4096 (covers worst-case 2 pos/round)
